channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina experiences rare sting of defeat, seeing 43-game winning streak end
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Top-ranked South Carolina felt something it hasn't known in over 2 1/2 years. The sting of defeat after being thoroughly dominated in a 77-62 loss to No. 5 UCLA on Sunday. Gone was the overall 43-game winning streak. Done was the run of 33 consecutive road victories. And the No.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sam Darnold leads game-winning drive in OT and Vikings beat Bears 30-27 after blowing late lead
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sam Darnold figured the Vikings would recover the Bears' onside kick near the end of regulation and he would only need to kneel. Though things got a little more complicated, he'll take this result.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina women stunned by fifth-ranked UCLA 77-62, ending Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Titans stun Texans as battered Will Levis hangs in to help Tennessee win
item.description: Tennessee Titans quarterback Will Levis found Chig Okonkwo for a 70-yard touchdown pass in the fourth quarter to help upset the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thitikul finishes eagle-birdie to win CME Group Tour Championship and claim record $4M prize
item.description: NAPLES, Fla. (AP) — Down by two shots with two holes to play, Jeeno Thitikul knew exactly what was needed to capture the biggest prize in women's golf history. And another eagle-birdie finish — for the second straight day — made it happen.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Levis throws 2 TD passes to help Titans outlast Texans 32-27
item.description: Will Levis threw for 278 yards and his 70-yard touchdown pass to Chig Okonkwo put Tennessee on top in the fourth quarter and the Titans held on for a 32-27 win over the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chiefs squander late double-digit lead, but survive in walk-off fashion against Panthers
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs led by 11 in the fourth quarter, but needed a walk-off field goal to beat the lowly Carolina Panthers to improve to 10-1.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kennesaw State beats No. 24 Rutgers 79-77 in program's 1st home game against ranked team
item.description: KENNESAW, Ga. (AP) — Jamil Miller had 16 points and 10 rebounds, and Kennesaw State dominated No. 24 Rutgers on Sunday and held on for a 79-77 win in the first home game against a ranked opponent in the program's history.
item.dc:creator: SEAN HOLOHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USF football rolls to bowl eligibility for 2nd straight year with 63-30 dismantling of Tulsa
item.description: South Florida (6-5; 4-3 American) earned the program’s 12th bowl appearance in 24 seasons of play at the FBS level, posting 715 yards of offense in a 63-30 domination of Tulsa (3-8; 1-6 American) Saturday on Senior Day in Raymond James Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Michigan alum Tom Brady helped convince No. 1 recruit to sway from LSU to Wolverines: report
item.description: Sure, money may have played a major role in Bryce Underwood's flip from LSU to Michigan, but apparently, so did Wolverines alum Tom Brady.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 13 coverage
item.description: Weekend highlights include wins by Los Gatos, De La Salle, St. Ignatius, San Ramon Valley, Wilcox, Bishop O'Dowd.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Appalachian State fans pelt James Madison players with snowballs before game
item.description: As the James Madison Dukes were entering the field from the tunnel, Appalachian State Mountaineer fans bombarded the players with snowballs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russell and Hamilton give Mercedes a 1-2 finish in Las Vegas
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — An ecstatic George Russell had just won the Formula 1 race Saturday night when he exclaimed in his radio, “Vegas!” He was ready to start celebrating in America's party capital, saying he would skip his flight back to his home in the United Kingdom to make the most of his Las
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 24 Illinois stuns Rutgers on Bryant's 40-yard TD reception with 4 seconds left
item.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J. (AP) — Trailing by one at the 40-yard line with 14 seconds to play and no timeouts, Illinois coach Bret Bielema sent in a play known as “church” to Luke Altmyer. The quarterback was to hit a receiver who was to go to the ground immediately.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GJ Tigers Football season recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—"It's hard to end an era with this senior class because they’re a special group of kids," said Head Coach Landon McKee. "They changed this program, and they get the credit for that.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: CMU women's basketball uses big 2nd quarter to down CSU Pueblo
item.description: From three balls, to great defense in the paint, to great team passing Mesa out-scored the Thunderwolves 28-10 in the second.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Teen Paves the Way for Female Hockey Players
item.description: Chloe Jezek, a 16-year-old high school hockey player in North County, is paving the way for other girls in the male-dominated sport.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Rays new stadium deal in play: Pinellas commissioner, St. Pete mayor
item.description: St. Petersburg resident and former Raymond James Executive Ron Diner is with the group No Home Run. They've been against a new Tampa Bay Rays stadium deal from the start.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MLB will test robot umpires at 13 spring training ballparks hosting 19 teams
item.description: MLB has been experimenting with the automated ball-strike system in the minor leagues since 2019 but is still working on the shape of the strike zone.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mike Evans trending towards playing against the Giants on Sunday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are looking to get back on track after four straight losses against the Giants, who swapped starting quarterbacks after losing five in a row.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: 20 years later: A look back at the Malice at the Palace
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV) — It has now been 20 whole years since the most infamous night in Indiana Pacers franchise history: The Malice at the Palace. One of the worst brawls in U.S. sports history, the incident occurred on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Rays will have to weather the storm next season at Steinbrenner Field
item.description: As the Tampa Bay Rays begin to gather information for their 2025 season at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, the most unpredictable and challenging element will most likely be weather.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lucas, WFLA, NBC
